description: Major healthcare technology company providing revenue cycle management, claims processing, and payment solutions. Operates one of largest healthcare financial networks in US. Acquired by UnitedHealth Group (Optum) in 2022.
business_model: B2B - RCM platform to healthcare providers and payers
target_market: Hospitals, health systems, physician practices, payers
competitive_advantage: Scale, network effects, end-to-end RCM, acquired by largest payer

varden_fit.rationale: Infrastructure giant - demonstrates massive market for claims/RCM automation
